message:
refactor(runtime): improve scheduler metrics and worker coordination

Enhance runtime internals for better observability and reliability.

runtime/mod.rs:
- Add runtime introspection helpers
- Expose scheduler metrics accessors

scheduler/three_lane.rs:
- Improve lane selection heuristics
- Better work distribution between priority lanes
- Add debug assertions for invariant checking

scheduler/worker.rs:
- Improve worker polling loop efficiency
- Better handling of empty queues
- Minor cleanup for consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
